subcodes.first_line: We bear witness, even as God Himself hath testified, that there is none other God but Him, in acknowledgment of His oneness and in recognition of His singleness and grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نشهد بما شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو اقرارا بوحدانیته و اعترافا بفردانیته و عظمته
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
